# Kite Club Koh Phangan

> Kitesurfing, wing foil, windsurfing, e-foil, kayaking and SUP school and rental on Koh Phangan, Thailand. IKO-certified courses, flat-water lagoon at Thong Sala Beach.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/): Overview of all water sports activities
- [Kitesurfing](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/kitesurfing/): Kitesurfing lessons and rental
- [Kitesurfing Lessons](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/kitesurfing/lessons/): Discovery, Beginner, Independent, Refresh, Pro, Hydrofoil courses
- [Wing Foil](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/wing-foil/): Wing foiling lessons and rental
- [Windsurfing](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/windsurfing/): Windsurfing lessons and rental
- [E-Foil](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/efoil/): Electric foil sessions at Chaloklam
- [Kite Safari](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/kite-safari/): 7-day Red Sea catamaran kite safari
- [Kayaking](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/kayaking/): Kayak rental on Koh Phangan
- [SUP Rental](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/sup-rental/): Stand-up paddleboard rental
- [Shop](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/shop/): Kite equipment shop — Slingshot kites and boards
- [Contacts](https://kiteclubkohphangan.com/contacts/): WhatsApp +66 96 720 3910

## Key Facts

- Location: Thong Sala Beach, Koh Phangan, Surat Thani, Thailand
- Phone/WhatsApp: +66 96 720 3910
- Email: kiteclubkohphangan@gmail.com
- Certifications: IKO (kitesurfing, wing foil)
- Peak season: March–April (18-25 knots)
- Languages: English, Russian, Arabic, German, Ukrainian
